description: Configure DHIS2 tracker metadata to enable Mother-Child linkage using the Maintenance app (login: admin / district). Create a Tracked Entity Attribute named 'Mother Registration ID' with Value Type 'Text', a short name of your choice, and the 'Searchable' property enabled. Additionally, create a Relationship Type named 'Mother-Child' where both the 'From' and 'To' sides are constrained to the 'Person' Tracked Entity Type. This configuration will allow health workers to link mothers to their children in the system.
